intro: Anoectochilus brevistylis, also known as Chinese kidney bean or kidney bean orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which may aid in reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Anoectochilus brevistylis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Anoectochilus brevistylis is commonly prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
